title: pterostylis mystacina
intro: Pterostylis mystacina, also known as the Murihinui or Whakaipiripiri, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pterostylis mystacina include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Pterostylis mystacina is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
